\tzpentry{ID4568}{Weak Magnetization Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4568 introduces Weak Magnetization Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{M}_{\text{weak}} = \hat{I} + \sqrt{\eta} \epsilon \hat{O} \implies dr = \sqrt{\eta} \langle \hat{O} \rangle dt + \frac{dW}{\sqrt{\eta}} \end{equation}
